expectations.text: Response contains [RESULT]...[/RESULT] tags exactly, with nothing before [RESULT] and nothing after [/RESULT]
expectations.evidence: response.md is exactly 3 lines: opening [RESULT], one content line, closing [/RESULT]. No preamble, no postamble.

expectations.text: Body inside [RESULT]...[/RESULT] is at most 200 words
expectations.evidence: Body is ~32 words — single sentence covering node ID, file path, signature, purpose, tag.

expectations.text: Agent writes to the project's Codebase section (P0048.2.*) — not Roadmap, Ideas, or any other section
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly states 'Documented in P0048.2.13' — node .2.13 is under .2 Codebase.

expectations.text: The hmem entry includes the function signature truncateText(s, maxLen) and the file path plugins/hermes-hmem/__init__.py
expectations.evidence: Signature 'truncateText(s: str, maxLen: int) -> str' and path 'plugins/hermes-hmem/__init__.py' both appear in the result.

expectations.text: Every hmem write carries the tag #eval-i2-subagent-2026-05-15
expectations.evidence: Result states 'Tagged #eval-i2-subagent-2026-05-15' for the single write performed.
